name: hb_3_10
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Tangshan (city 2) on 2025-06-15 compute and store: total_steel_flue_gas (all STEEL enterprises), steel_company_count (int), city_mean_aqi, city_max_aqi (float).

turns.query: Analyze the emission patterns of all steel enterprises in Tangshan city(city id: 2) on 2025-06-15 and compare with the city's air quality index.
